title: Independent WORM terminal-receipt readback ACK (S1.2 LR0B)
description: Canonical self-hashed readback acknowledgement produced by an INDEPENDENT verifier (readback_verifier_id must differ from the append actor, mirroring the frozen contract actor_contract.same_actor_allowed=false). A positive ack (ack=true) requires a distinct verifier, a matching readback_payload_digest, and same_actor_violation=false. The append actor reading its own record must set same_actor_violation=true and refuse to ack. These distinctness rules are enforced in the delegated Python validator.
